name: Automotive Maintenance
overview: Modern automobiles are important to many aspects of American life. Those who service automobiles must understand each principle, and how these principles interact to provide smooth, efficient performance. Owners of cars also benefit by understanding how their vehicles operate. This enables them to understand why certain periodic maintenance is required to keep their vehicles in tip-top shape.

requirements.text: NOTE: You will need access to a car or truck and its owner's manual to meet some requirements for this merit badge. If you do not have your own vehicle, you should work with your counselor or other trusted adult to obtain access to a vehicle and the owner's manual for that vehicle.

children.value: NOTE: You will need access to a car or truck and its owner's manual to meet some requirements for this merit badge. If you do not have your own vehicle, you should work with your counselor or other trusted adult to obtain access to a vehicle and the owner's manual for that vehicle.

requirements.text: Safety and Registration. Do the following:

content.value: Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain to your counselor the hazards you are most likely to encounter during automotive maintenance activities, and what you should do to anticipate, help prevent, mitigate, or lessen these hazards.

content.value: Explain to your counselor the hazards you are most likely to encounter during automotive maintenance activities, and what you should do to anticipate, help prevent, mitigate, or lessen these hazards.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Discuss with your counselor the safety equipment, tools, and clothing used while checking or repairing a motor vehicle. Use this equipment, tools, and/or clothing (when needed or called for) in meeting the requirements for this merit badge.

content.value: Discuss with your counselor the safety equipment, tools, and clothing used while checking or repairing a motor vehicle. Use this equipment, tools, and/or clothing (when needed or called for) in meeting the requirements for this merit badge.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Explain the different ways motor vehicles are powered.

content.value: Explain the different ways motor vehicles are powered.

resources.title: Difference Between Diesel and Gas Engines (video)
Different Types of Motors in Electric Vehicles (video)

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Explain the safety considerations when performing maintenance on a vehicle equipped with a high-voltage electrical system.

content.value: Explain the safety considerations when performing maintenance on a vehicle equipped with a high-voltage electrical system.

sub_requirements.label: e
sub_requirements.text: Review the maintenance chart in the vehicle owner's manual. Explain the requirements and time limits.

content.value: Review the maintenance chart in the vehicle owner's manual. Explain the requirements and time limits.

resources.title: Should I Follow the Manufacturer's Maintenance Schedule (video)

sub_requirements.label: f
sub_requirements.text: Explain the purpose, importance, and limitations of safety belts and passive restraints.

content.value: Explain the purpose, importance, and limitations of safety belts and passive restraints.

sub_requirements.label: g
sub_requirements.text: Find out the requirements for your state's emissions and safety inspections (as applicable), including how often a vehicle needs to be inspected.

content.value: Find out the requirements for your state's emissions and safety inspections (as applicable), including how often a vehicle needs to be inspected.

resources.title: Tips on How to Pass State Inspection (video)

sub_requirements.label: h
sub_requirements.text: Explain the importance of registering a vehicle and find out the annual registration fee for renewing your family car's registration.

content.value: Explain the importance of registering a vehicle and find out the annual registration fee for renewing your family car's registration.
Do the following:

sub_requirements.text: Demonstrate how to check the following:

sub_requirements.text: Power steering fluid

sub_requirements.text: Windshield washer fluid

content.value: Windshield washer fluid

sub_requirements.text: Transmission fluid

content.value: Transmission fluid

sub_requirements.text: Battery fluid (if possible) and condition of the battery terminals

content.value: Battery fluid (if possible) and condition of the battery terminals

resources.title: How to Care for Your Automotive Battery (video)
How to Check & Properly Fill Water Levels in a Car Battery (video)

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Locate the fuse boxes; determine the type and size of fuses. Demonstrate the proper replacement of burned-out fuses.

content.value: Locate the fuse boxes; determine the type and size of fuses. Demonstrate the proper replacement of burned-out fuses.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Demonstrate how to check the condition and tension of belts and hoses.

content.value: Demonstrate how to check the condition and tension of belts and hoses.

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Check the vehicle for proper operation of its lights, including the interior overhead lights, instrument lights, warning lights, and exterior bulbs.

content.value: Check the vehicle for proper operation of its lights, including the interior overhead lights, instrument lights, warning lights, and exterior bulbs.

sub_requirements.label: e
sub_requirements.text: Locate and check the air filter(s).

requirements.text: Dashboard/Driver Information Center. Do the following:

content.value: Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain the function of the fuel gauge, speedometer, tachometer, oil pressure, and engine temperature gauge. Point each one out on the instrument cluster.

content.value: Explain the function of the fuel gauge, speedometer, tachometer, oil pressure, and engine temperature gauge. Point each one out on the instrument cluster.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Explain the symbols that light up on the dashboard and the difference between the yellow and red symbols. Explain each of the indicators on the dashboard, using the owner's manual if necessary.

content.value: Explain the symbols that light up on the dashboard and the difference between the yellow and red symbols. Explain each of the indicators on the dashboard, using the owner's manual if necessary.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Explain the messages and alerts that may be displayed on the dashboard/ driver information center including maintenance-related reminders.

content.value: Explain the messages and alerts that may be displayed on the dashboard/ driver information center including maintenance-related reminders.
Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain the difference between tire manufacturer's and vehicle manufacturer's specifications and show where to find them.

content.value: Explain the difference between tire manufacturer's and vehicle manufacturer's specifications and show where to find them.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Demonstrate how to check tire pressure and properly inflate a tire. Check the spare tire and make sure it is ready for use.

content.value: Demonstrate how to check tire pressure and properly inflate a tire. Check the spare tire and make sure it is ready for use.

resources.title: How to Properly Check and Fill Tires (video)

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Explain why wheel alignment is important to the life of a tire. Explain caster, camber, and toe-in adjustments on wheel alignment.

content.value: Explain why wheel alignment is important to the life of a tire. Explain caster, camber, and toe-in adjustments on wheel alignment.

Knowing When to Replace Your Tires (video)

sub_requirements.text: Explain how to dispose of old tires in accordance with local laws and regulations.

content.value: Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain how an internal combustion engine operates. Tell the differences between gasoline and diesel engines. Explain how a gasoline-electric hybrid vehicle is powered.

content.value: Explain how an internal combustion engine operates. Tell the differences between gasoline and diesel engines. Explain how a gasoline-electric hybrid vehicle is powered.

resources.title: Engines 101: Basics of How Engines Work (video)

sub_requirements.label: b

sub_requirements.text: Explain the need for coolant in the cooling system, and the importance of selecting the correct coolant type for a given vehicle.

content.value: Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: b

Do the following:

content.value: Do TWO of the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Determine the value of three different vehicles you are interested in purchasing. One must be new and one must be used; the third vehicle can be new or used. For each vehicle, find out the requirements and cost of automobile insurance to include basic liability and options for collision, comprehensive, towing, and rental car. Using the three vehicles you chose and with your counselor's assistance, complete the operation/maintenance chart provided in the Automotive Maintenance merit badge pamphlet. Use this information to determine the operating cost per mile for each vehicle, and discuss what you learn with your counselor.

content.value: Determine the value of three different vehicles you are interested in purchasing. One must be new and one must be used; the third vehicle can be new or used. For each vehicle, find out the requirements and cost of automobile insurance to include basic liability and options for collision, comprehensive, towing, and rental car. Using the three vehicles you chose and with your counselor's assistance, complete the operation/maintenance chart provided in the
merit badge pamphlet. Use this information to determine the operating cost per mile for each vehicle, and discuss what you learn with your counselor.

resources.title: How to Negotiate and Buy a Used Car (video)

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Choose a car cleaner and wax product for a vehicle you want to clean. Explain clear-coat paint and the precautions necessary for care. Clean the vehicle, both inside and out, and wax the exterior. Use a vinyl and rubber protectant (on vinyl tops, rubber door seals, sidewalls, etc.) and explain the importance of this protectant.

content.value: Choose a car cleaner and wax product for a vehicle you want to clean. Explain clear-coat paint and the precautions necessary for care. Clean the vehicle, both inside and out, and wax the exterior. Use a vinyl and rubber protectant (on vinyl tops, rubber door seals, sidewalls, etc.) and explain the importance of this protectant.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Locate the manufacturer's jack. Use the jack to demonstrate how to engage the jack correctly on the vehicle, then change a tire correctly.

content.value: Locate the manufacturer's jack. Use the jack to demonstrate how to engage the jack correctly on the vehicle, then change a tire correctly.

resources.title: How to Change a Flat Tire (video)

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Perform an oil filter and oil change on a vehicle. Explain how to properly dispose of the used oil and filter.

content.value: Perform an oil filter and oil change on a vehicle. Explain how to properly dispose of the used oil and filter.

requirements.text: Find out about three career opportunities in the automotive industry. Pick one and find out the education, training, and experience required for this profession. Discuss this with your counselor, and explain why this profession might interest you.

content.value: Find out about three career opportunities in the automotive industry. Pick one and find out the education, training, and experience required for this profession. Discuss this with your counselor, and explain why this profession might interest you.

Automotive Jobs: The Highest Paying Ones  (video)
